---
title: "variantcalling"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir=normalizePath('..//..//'))
```

# GATK BaseRecalibrator, ApplyBQSR, and HaplotypeCaller

Submit:

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
sbatch --array=1-876 BQSR_array.sh
```

Main script:

- `scripts/work/jyanglab/subhash/BQSR/BQSR_array.sh`

Important paths:

- Manifest: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/BQSR/samples.tsv`
- Reference: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/2.refrence/Phytozome/PhytozomeV13/Sbicolor/v5.1/assembly/sorghum_v5.1.fa`
- Known sites: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/known_sites/known_sites_merged.num.renamed.vcf.gz`
- BQSR BAM output: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/BQSR/bam`
- gVCF output: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/BQSR/gvcf`

Tools:

- `gatk4/4.4`
- `samtools`

# GenomicsDBImport in 5 Mb Intervals

Main script:

- `scripts/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/scripts/genomicsdb_import_array_922.sbatch`

Important paths:

- Sample map: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/sample_maps/gdb_sample_map_922.tsv`
- Intervals: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/intervals/intervals_5mb.list`
- Workspaces: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/workspaces`

Array:

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
#SBATCH --array=1-149
```

# GenotypeGVCFs from GenomicsDB

Main script:

- `scripts/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/scripts/genotype_from_gdb_array.sbatch`

Important paths:

- Manifest: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/scripts/genotype_5mb_manifest.tsv`
- Reference: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/2.refrence/Phytozome/PhytozomeV13/Sbicolor/v5.1/assembly/sorghum_v5.1.fa`

# Gather Raw VCFs

Main script:

- `scripts/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/scripts/gather_raw_vcf.sbatch`

Important paths:

- Ordered VCF list:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/scripts/vcf_list_manifest_order.txt`
- Raw gathered VCF:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/RAW_vcf/RAW_SAP_BQSR.vcf.gz`

# Filter SNPs

Main script:

- `scripts/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/final_vcf/scripts/filter_snps.sbatch`

Final SNP VCF:

- `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/final_vcf/results/SAP_BQSR_filtered_snps.vcf.gz`

Hard filter expression:

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
MQ < 20.0 || QD < 2.0 || FS > 60.0 || MQRankSum < -12.5 || ReadPosRankSum < -8.0 || QUAL < 30.0
```

Genotype filter:

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
DP < 3
```

# Filter INDELs

Main script:

- `scripts/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/final_vcf/scripts/filter_indels.sbatch`

Final INDEL VCF:

- `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/final_vcf/results/SAP_BQSR_filtered_indels.vcf.gz`

Hard filter expression:

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
QD < 2.0 || FS > 200.0 || ReadPosRankSum < -20.0 || SOR > 10.0 || QUAL < 30.0
```

Genotype filter:

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
DP < 3
```
